title: Upgraded Armory
description: 6 New weapons that have unique uses designed for PvP combat.
body:
![logo (super cool btw)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a06d00949e4e610e237af451510c4f74676143eb.png)

### Adds 6 weapons designed for PvP. Each with new effects, and unique properties that seperate them from vannila weapons. 

## **Effects** ![Effect Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37e8dbb6bf78e6eb9737cabe121d38b1623f739b.png)


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Bleeding: Removes all knockback, but lowers you max HP, and deals constant damage. 

Drunk: Lowers your defence, and increases your damage.

Heavy: Slows you down, and increases gravity.


</details>


## **Items** ![Item Texture Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a12aed879f345d21bbd0da26a55462bcd3f96a93.png)


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Ale: Drink This to obtain the Drunk Effect.

Ale Tosser: Allows the player to throw ale at other players/mobs, giving them the Drunk Effect as well.

Blossoming Sword: A sword with the same stats as diamond, but shoots a barage of flowers apon right clicking.

Hedge Trimmer: An axe that gives you the heavy effect whilst holding it, and applys the bleeding effect to any player hit with it.

Kunai: A thrown weapon, that applys bleeding to players hit by it, also a way to apply bleeding to yourself.

Sythe: A very slow weapon that does high damage, Can be enchanted with Siphon, which removes XP from any players hit, and gives it to you. When holding the weapon you get the heavy effect.

Ice Sythe: An easy to craft Sythe alternative, that cannot be enchanted with Siphon, but does not give you the heavy effect. The item has very low durrability, and when it breaks, it shatters into 10-15 ice crystals that deal damage to anything hit by them.

</details>

**Some of the enchantments _require_ the mod to be instaled on a server, IE: Siphon only works on other players. I will most likley not port this mod to fabric so please don't ask.😭**
